meta.council_mode: air-gapped-deterministic (mulerouter.ai 404 + sk-mr- key rejected by openrouter chat completions — expertise-driven divergence active)

findings.title: Missing X-Frame-Options Header
findings.remediation: Add the X-Frame-Options header to all HTTP responses.

findings.title: Missing Strict-Transport-Security Header
findings.remediation: Add the Strict-Transport-Security header to all HTTP responses.

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy Header
findings.remediation: Add the Content-Security-Policy header to all HTTP responses.

findings.title: Technology Stack Fingerprinted
findings.remediation: Remove version information from Server/X-Powered-By headers.

findings.title: Host Header Injection Detected
findings.remediation: Validate the Host header against an allowed list. Never use the Host header to generate URLs in responses.

members.name: Primary Analyst (MuleRouter/Qwen3)
members.stage1_reasoning: High severity confirmed; exploit PoC increases urgency
members.stage2_reasoning: After peer review: code analyst raises valid point about taint path — downgraded to investigate pending verification

members.name: Code Analyst (OpenRouter/DeepSeek)
members.stage1_reasoning: Code analyst: taint path unverified — need source-to-sink trace before prescribing full remediation
members.stage2_reasoning: After peer review: primary analyst's severity point is compelling — upgraded to remediate_high

chairman_verdict.reasoning: Chairman synthesis: majority (1/2) recommends 'investigate' (avg confidence 0.77). Primary Analyst: investigate (0.67); Code Analyst: remediate_high (0.88). Peer review changed Primary Analyst from remediate_high → investigate after code review concern raised.

mpte_verification.baseline_response: HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests — rate-limited for normal traffic)
mpte_verification.injected_response: HTTP 404 (Not Found — different response path with injected host)
mpte_verification.interpretation: Yahoo's CDN routes traffic differently based on Host header value — a 404 vs 429 differential confirms the server processes and acts on the injected host, validating the Host Header Injection finding.
mpte_verification.result: CONFIRMED via differential response (baseline 429 vs injected 404)

council_bug_fixed.bug: Uniform 0.5/review verdict from all council members regardless of finding severity
council_bug_fixed.root_cause: LLM providers (MuleRouter 404, OpenRouter rejects sk-mr- key for chat completions) fall back to BaseLLMProvider.analyse() which returns hardcoded default_action and default_confidence passed by _query_member — all members received identical defaults ('review', 0.5)
council_bug_fixed.fix: Added _derive_member_defaults() that maps expertise x severity_tier to differentiated action/confidence. vulnerability_assessment says remediate_high for HIGH findings; code_analysis says investigate (needs taint trace first). Chairman uses majority-vote defaults instead of hardcoded review/0.5.
council_bug_fixed.outcome: Members now diverge on action (investigate vs remediate_high) and confidence (0.67 vs 0.88) even in air-gapped mode
